title: India’s MiG-29s Set For Lethal Upgrade With ASRAAM Missiles, Sharpen Edge Against China & Pakistan
description: ASRAAM is primarily a within-visual-range (WVR) air dominance missile having a strike range above 25 km. Reports indicate that the Ministry of Defence issued a Request for Proposal (RFP) on March 25 for the integration of ASRAAM on the MiG-29s.
